name: ECC TDD Workflow - Authentication Module
description: Test-driven development of an authentication module with coverage convergence

inputs.request: Implement JWT authentication middleware with refresh token rotation

phases: analyze-strategy (test pyramid, mocking boundaries, coverage targets)
red (write failing tests for all components, exit code 1)
refactor (SOLID, clean code, tests still green)
gap-closure (iterate until threshold met, max 3 rounds)
